name: youra-tools
description: Claude Code skills for academic paper workflows — literature gap-finding, code-faithful Methodology, results-faithful Experiments, strict peer-review simulation, feedback-driven revision looping, and pre-submission stress-test orchestration.

plugins.name: youra-tools
plugins.description: Academic paper workflow skills: gap-finder (literature survey + hallucination-proof verification), experiments-writer (results-faithful Experiments rewriting), methodology-writer (code-faithful Methodology writing), paper-review (strict ACL/NeurIPS/EMNLP peer-review simulation), revision-loop (feedback-driven revision with ralph-style persistence and reviewer gate), and submission-ready (stress-test orchestrator looping paper-review ↔ revision-loop to convergence).
